meaning: 堪察加半岛[苏联东北部]
examples: This Kamchatka Peninsula lake is home to hundreds of bears, and visitors can see them tuck into a feast during the wild salmon run, one of Earth's greatest.
A hiker climbs amid volcanic fumes in Russia's Kamchatka peninsula.
A man herds reindeer in Bystrinsky Park on Russia's Kamchatka Peninsula.
Having nine time zones, Russia begins its presidential elections in Chukotka, Yakutia, Sakhalin, and Kamchatka.
Kamchatka may have an unorthodox approach to tourism, but it has a lot to teach the open-minded.
